title: 係香港 定 去加拿大讀社工好

replies.msg:
今年廿歲
前幾個月quit咗soc work asso
本身諗住下年讀翻
不過而家諗緊
好似過加拿大好似好啲？
想拎pr

定係去加拿大讀啲實用嘅文憑
搵咗好多資料
但係都好驚揀錯

想唔想返黎做？
唔想就走啦 去嗰邊
LM

quote.msg:
想唔想返黎做？
唔想就走啦 去嗰邊

replies.msg:
好講真
如果香港仲係好好地
我真係想留係香港

我諗緊嘅係
喺香港讀完 可以過去work holiday
做一年嘢拎pr
但係實好難搵工

而係加拿大驚自己讀得廢
晒咗屋企人錢
而且dse成績差
唔知入唔入到好嘅文憑
一定係移民
加拿大社工同香港社工完全係兩樣工作

replies.msg:
先唔計你學費
住宿都有唔同玩法
你可以住宿舍 hse租間房 apartment 或者同人一齊租
宿舍近學校應該都1 2千加幣
租間房睇你加拿大邊個城市 應該都5 6百加幣起跳
食野出去食多嘅話一個月都可能3 4百加幣
當你所有野加埋稅再乘6=港幣
咁你可以再試下計下條數先

replies.msg:
建議你如果去加拿大就考CELPIP, 易啲。

另外都要睇番學科要求使唔使考，同埋考邊隻。㨂左科先，唔好嘥錢

咁你其實係想係邊度做社工?
想係邊做就係番邊度讀最好

社工最重要係了解當地文化同政策
你係香港讀完去第二度做會比較難做，人地社會服務模式，個案管理都有唔同做法

replies.msg:
其實邊行都好，掉轉諗下人地點解要請你就會明
第一：你唔係真正bilingual/trilingual（英文/法文）
第二：你係外國人，唔熟加拿大文化
第三：你冇citizenship，即係公司要付出額外成本去請你

唔好諗住用香港果套（讀返個degree/master就得）去睇外國
人地除咗學歷，仲有好多factor要考慮

所以主要靠把口既工種真係唔建議去外國，不如考慮吓啲技術型profession（IT/engine/nurse/水電）仲好

replies.msg:
I am a retired tax auditor. I have been to many mining companies' head office in large cities and their mine sites out in the wilderness.
There are some Asian working at their head office (accounting and tax department) etc. But there were no Asian working at the mine site. Those who looked like "Asian" are actually "native( first nations)'. I was mistaken as a 'native' more than a few times.

Working under a mine is a very physical demanding job. I doubt most "Asian" can tolerate that. I had to go down the mines on many occasions and I couldn't stand more than an hour. one of the gold mine I visited is over 6000 feet deep. It took 90 minutes one way to go down by elevator.
It may be faster now because they installed a new elevator a few years ago.

Lee Ka Lau,[2] Francis Lau, Benny Lau, and Kwok Yuen Ho[3] founded ATI in 1985 as Array Technology Inc.[4] Working primarily in the OEM field, ATI produced integrated graphics cards for PC manufacturers such as IBM and Commodore. By 1987, ATI had grown into an independent graphics-card retailer, introducing EGA Wonder and VGA Wonder card product lines that year.[5] In the early nineties, they released products able to process graphics without the CPU: in May 1991, the Mach8, in 1992 the Mach32, which offered improved memory bandwidth and GUI acceleration. ATI Technologies Inc. went public in 1993, with shares listed on NASDAQ and on the Toronto Stock Exchange.

I am a retired tax auditor. I have been to many mining companies' head office in large cities and their mine sites out in the wilderness.
There are some Asian working at their head office (accounting and tax department) etc. But there were no Asian working at the mine site. Those who looked like "Asian" are actually "native( first nations)'. I was mistaken as a 'native' more than a few times.

Working under a mine is a very physical demanding job. I doubt most "Asian" can tolerate that. I had to go down the mines on many occasions and I couldn't stand more than an hour. one of the gold mine I visited is over 6000 feet deep. It took 90 minutes one way to go down by elevator.

replies.msg: agree. At least in my social circle, even myself included. We are physically lackluster to locals that are born here and used to physical labor. For the younger ones coming here, they much are able to tough it up. But strength requirement even for working at a Walmart here is a lot higher than comparative jobs in HK.   I think simply saying that working at trades is a straight easy path that anyone one can do would be an overstatement.
